universe.description: 79-name universe: 75 top U.S. mega/large-cap stocks with full GICS sector coverage plus 4 commodity ETFs (gold, silver, oil, copper).

market_brief.brief: Welcome. U.S. equities: S&P -0.04%, Nasdaq -0.14%, Dow -0.15%. Financials led sectors (+0.70%) while Real Estate lagged (-1.12%). GPT-5.4 led the day at +3.00%. 6 of 6 models green on the day. Cumulative leader: DeepSeek Reasoner at +17.69%. Key headline: Big Tech’s $16 Trillion Earnings Week Is Make-Or-Break for Rally - Bloomberg — broadly positive for equities.
market_brief.key_moves: NEM -3.6% (held by 0/6) | AMD -3.4% (held by 6/6) | CRM +2.2% (held by 1/6)
